title: Navigation history hook with bounded stack and ref synchronization
purpose: Maintains a bounded stack of navigation entries for cross-file navigation, allowing users to jump to new locations and backtrack through recent entries with a maximum limit of 20 entries.
module_context: Exports a NavEntry interface for navigation history entries and a NavHistory interface defining the hook's API. Uses a default maximum entry count of 20.

steps.content: Initialize the navigation history state with an empty array of entries.
Create a ref mirror to maintain synchronous access to the current navigation stack.
Synchronize the ref mirror with the state whenever the state changes.
Return an object containing the current entries, push, back, clear, and canGoBack properties.
Add the new navigation entry to the existing entries.
Trim the entries array to the maximum allowed count by removing the oldest entries.
Update the ref mirror synchronously to reflect the new entries.
Update the state with the new entries.
Read the current navigation entries from the ref mirror.
IF the entries array is empty, return null.
Extract the most recent entry from the entries array.
Create a new entries array without the most recent entry.
Update the ref mirror synchronously to reflect the new entries.
Update the state with the new entries.
Clear the ref mirror by setting it to an empty array.
Clear the state by setting it to an empty array.
